{{Infobox location
| name = Lumen Arkana
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lumen Arkana]] is the largest city on the planet [[Zykaros]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13">''The Pilot'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lumen Arkana]] is a location with dark, neon-outlined streets.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c33">''The Pilot'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lumen Arkana]] is a city on the nightside of [[Zykaros]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c42">''The Pilot'', chapter 42</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
